title: Best Enchant Setups
quickAnswer: A strong default setup is: pickaxe with Efficiency, Unbreaking, Mending, and either Fortune or Silk Touch; armor with Protection, Unbreaking, Mending; and weapons built around Sharpness or Power plus utility enchants.
keyFacts: Most players eventually want both a Fortune pick and a Silk Touch pick because those roles conflict.
Boots and helmets have several situational choices, so the 'best' setup depends on whether you value traversal, underwater work, or pure combat.
Ranged gear scales well with Infinity or Mending depending on how comfortable you are supplying arrows.
commonMistakes: Trying to squeeze every niche enchant onto one item regardless of XP and anvil cost.
Using Silk Touch on your main resource-gathering pick and wondering why yields feel low.
